mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window or positive returns occur in less than 50 percent of declining rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid quarterly increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in greater than 60 percent of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand recovery, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive SPX direction with greater than 55 percent accuracy over 20-day windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production index values reflect strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO momentum yields negative SPX 5-day returns in greater than 65 percent of observations during early-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent monthly growth in total nonfarm payrolls indicates sustained labor market expansion and rising aggregate income, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window or payroll growth fails to correlate with positive SPX direction.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly CPI inflation exceeding 0.4 percent triggers expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 20d returns in greater than 60 percent of high-inflation triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in industrial production and real GDP confirms robust supply-side growth and economic momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive trends in INDPRO and GDPC1 fail to predict positive SPX direction with greater than 55 percent accuracy over 60-day windows.

mechanism_narrative: Declining retail sales figures signal weakening consumer spending and demand destruction, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Negative RSAFS momentum yields positive SPX 5-day returns in greater than 65 percent of observations during late-cycle contraction phases.
